title: Listening - Part 1
description: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best.
instructions: You will hear three different extracts. For questions 1–6, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear. There are two questions for each extract.

extracts.context: You hear two colleagues discussing a project deadline.
extracts.audio_script: man: Are you sure we can meet the deadline for this project? It's coming up fast. || woman: I think so, although [1]we really need everyone to stay focused[/1]. The timeline is tight, but not impossible. || man: I'm worried because last time, we faced unexpected issues. || woman: True, but [2]I’ve learned from those mistakes and planned accordingly[/2]. The risk is lower now. || man: Okay, if you say so. I’ll make sure the team is well-prepared.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Are you sure we can meet the deadline for this project? It's coming up fast.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I think so, although we really need everyone to stay focused. The timeline is tight, but not impossible.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I'm worried because last time, we faced unexpected issues.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: True, but I’ve learned from those mistakes and planned accordingly. The risk is lower now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Okay, if you say so. I’ll make sure the team is well-prepared.

questions.question: What is the man's main concern about the project?

options.A: They might not have enough resources.
options.B: The team might not stay focused.

questions.explanation: B is supported by [1]we really need everyone to stay focused[/1] because it's highlighted as crucial to meet the deadline.

questions.question: The woman implies that she...

options.C: is unsure about the project's success.

questions.explanation: A is supported by [2]I’ve learned from those mistakes and planned accordingly[/2] indicating she has improved her planning.

extracts.context: You hear a man and a woman discussing their recent hiking trip.
extracts.audio_script: man: That hike was more challenging than I thought it would be. || woman: Yeah, I didn’t expect the trail to be so steep. I underestimated it. || man: At least the view from the top was worth the effort, don’t you think? [3]Even if my legs are still sore[/3]. || woman: Absolutely, but [4]next time, let’s plan a bit more and bring extra supplies[/4]. || man: Agreed. And maybe we should bring some trekking poles.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That hike was more challenging than I thought it would be.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yeah, I didn’t expect the trail to be so steep. I underestimated it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: At least the view from the top was worth the effort, don’t you think? Even if my legs are still sore.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Absolutely, but next time, let’s plan a bit more and bring extra supplies.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Agreed. And maybe we should bring some trekking poles.

questions.question: What does the man suggest about the hike?
questions.explanation: C is supported by [3]Even if my legs are still sore[/3], indicating the physical demand of the hike.

questions.question: What does the woman propose for future hikes?
questions.explanation: B is supported by [4]next time, let’s plan a bit more and bring extra supplies[/4], indicating better preparation.

extracts.context: You hear two friends planning a weekend getaway.
extracts.audio_script: man: So, have you thought about where we should go this weekend? || woman: I was thinking maybe a beach day, but it’s supposed to rain. || man: Oh, that’s a bummer. [5]We could visit that new museum exhibit[/5], it just opened. || woman: That’s not a bad idea. Remember to book tickets in advance; it’s quite popular. || man: Got it! Let’s just hope the rain doesn’t follow us everywhere.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: So, have you thought about where we should go this weekend?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I was thinking maybe a beach day, but it’s supposed to rain.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Oh, that’s a bummer. We could visit that new museum exhibit, it just opened.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That’s not a bad idea. Remember to book tickets in advance; it’s quite popular.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Got it! Let’s just hope the rain doesn’t follow us everywhere.

questions.question: What does the man suggest they do instead of going to the beach?
questions.explanation: B is supported by [5]We could visit that new museum exhibit[/5], his alternative suggestion.

questions.question: What is the woman most concerned about?
questions.explanation: C is supported by [6]Remember to book tickets in advance; it’s quite popular[/6], indicating her concern about tickets.
